summary: Iter-45 retest after Link import restore. CONFIRMED: <Link> ReferenceError is gone — RestaurantCheckout.jsx now imports Link from react-router-dom. BUT discovered TWO ADDITIONAL missing imports of the same kind from the iter-44 refactor: ChevronLeft (line 214) and CheckCircle2 (line 184) were both used but not imported from lucide-react, AND PORTION_LABEL (line 109) was used but not imported from ../lib/cart. These cumulatively still crashed /restaurant/checkout with 'ChevronLeft is not defined'. I patched all three missing imports in /app/frontend/src/pages/RestaurantCheckout.jsx (line 2 + lines 9-15) and re-verified: page renders cleanly end-to-end with all expected testids (container, items, summary, sum-subtotal, sum-delivery, sum-total, back-restaurant, pay-btn, checkout-line-*, co-inc-*, co-dec-*, co-qty-*, co-remove-*, co-edit-variant-*), zero pageerrors, real Add-to-cart → checkout flow shows 'Dal Makhani ₹260 × 1' with Pay ₹310 button. Empty-cart placeholder <Link to='/'> works (clicking navigates to /). Login page still has exactly 2 bad-stuff-marquee + 0 login-hero-spacer. Backend pytest test_iter43.py = 5/5 PASS.
passed_checks: /restaurant/checkout (with seeded cart): restaurant-checkout=1, checkout-items=1, checkout-summary=1, sum-subtotal=1, sum-delivery=1, sum-total=1, back-restaurant=1, checkout-pay-btn=1
/restaurant/checkout cart line testids: checkout-line-* present, co-inc, co-dec, co-qty, co-remove, co-edit-variant ALL present for the seeded line
/restaurant/checkout empty-cart placeholder <Link to='/'> renders and click navigates to /
Real flow: phone 9876543213 OTP login → /restaurant Add Dal Makhani → /restaurant/checkout shows 'Dal Makhani ₹260 × 1 = ₹260' + Pay ₹310 cleanly. 0 pageerrors
action_items: [ALREADY FIXED BY TESTING AGENT] /app/frontend/src/pages/RestaurantCheckout.jsx: added ChevronLeft + CheckCircle2 to lucide-react import (lines 12-16) and PORTION_LABEL to ../lib/cart import (line 9-12). Same class of refactor-cleanup regression as the Link drop — the iter-44 refactor stripped THREE more identifiers used by the parent file (ChevronLeft in back-button, CheckCircle2 in success screen, PORTION_LABEL in variant-switch toast).
critical_code_review_comments: The iter-44 refactor of RestaurantCheckout.jsx (449→365 lines) had a systemic issue: it removed FOUR identifiers from imports that were still used by the parent file — Link (already fixed), ChevronLeft, CheckCircle2, and PORTION_LABEL. Recommend running `eslint --no-eslintrc --rule 'no-undef:error'` on this file as a pre-merge guard. The toast.success path for variant change (line 109) won't crash on render but would crash on user click — easy to miss in render-only tests.

Consider adding an ErrorBoundary around /restaurant/checkout so future undefined-identifier mistakes don't kill the whole page silently (the React DevHelper overlay only appears in dev; in prod the page would just be blank).
All other iter-44 refactors (delivery package, SEO dedup, login marquee, AdminRawMaterials Stat/StockTopupCell extraction) remain green — no new regressions detected in iter-45.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/RestaurantCheckout.jsx (added ChevronLeft + CheckCircle2 to lucide-react imports; added PORTION_LABEL to ../lib/cart imports)

success_rate.frontend: 100% after my fix — /login, /restaurant, /restaurant/checkout (logged-in seeded cart + real Add-to-cart + empty placeholder) all green

test_credentials: Subscriber OTP: phone=9876543213 (or 9876543210 if not rate-limited; OTP via dev_otp field in /api/auth/send-otp response). Throttle: each phone hit by send-otp ~ once per minute; rotate phones for repeated runs.
seed_data_creation: Did real Add-to-cart click on /restaurant/menu (avoids being clobbered by AuthContext's guest-cart hydration that overwrites localStorage on login).
context_for_next_testing_agent: If /restaurant/checkout testing required, prefer the REAL UI flow: login → /restaurant → click an Add button → goto /restaurant/checkout. localStorage seeding alone gets overwritten by AuthContext.hydrateGuestCart on login (cart.js:81). Also: OTP send is rate-limited per phone — rotate phones (9876543211–9876543216).
rca of the issue: RCA: The iter-44 RestaurantCheckout refactor that extracted CheckoutCartLine + BillSummary into ./components/checkout/* aggressively pruned imports believing all the named symbols were only consumed inside the extracted children. Four identifiers (Link, ChevronLeft, CheckCircle2, PORTION_LABEL) were still referenced by the parent — three in JSX (success-screen icons + back-button chevron) and one in a toast.success template literal. Iter-44 main agent fixed only Link. I patched the remaining three so the page renders. Mitigation going forward: ESLint `no-undef` would have caught all four at lint time before merge.
